html:
Exclusive to:

A Boat Cannon is a Weapon introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 5 Logs, 4 Gunpowder and 6 Coconuts to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can only be used while attached to a Boat's light slot. It does 100 damage and uses 6.66% of its durability per shot, allowing 15 shots per cannon.

In Shipwrecked worlds, Nitre, an ingredient of Gunpowder, is not renewable. Despite this, Boat Cannons can be renewed by giving Lobster Dinner to Yaarctopus, using the Slot Machine to obtain Gunpowder, or by digging up an X Marks the Spot. Players can also go through the Seaworthy to the base game world and get renewable Nitre from Caves during Earthquakes.

Usage

×4

×4

DSTDSRoGSWHam

"boatcannon"
“The only thing better than a boat is a boat with a cannon.”
–Wilson
“I wonder if I can start fires with this?”
–Willow
“Is the mightiest weapon!”
–Wolfgang
“It brings low death to high seas!”
–Wendy
“HAHA. NICE”
–WX-78
“For combat at sea, I presume.”
–Wickerbottom
“This'll blow'em up real good!”
–Woodie
“It's about time I got my hands on one of these.”
–Maxwell
“Explosive! Someone could do considerable damage with this!”
–Wagstaff
“It smites mine enemies för me!?”
–Wigfrid
“With this we can make a warship!”
–Webber
“Shooting it into the water can make some pretty sweet waves.”
–Walani
“I cannon wait to use this!”
–Warly
“Ready ta fire six pounders!”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA TAKE ARMS AGAINST SEA OF TROUBLES”
–Wilba
“BOOM! BOOM! for Floater”
–Wormwood
“A Pew-matic for my boat.”
–Wheeler
A Boat Cannon is a Weapon introduced in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires 5 Logs, 4 Gunpowder and 6 Coconuts to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can only be used while attached to a Boat's light slot. It does 100 damage and uses 6.66% of its durability per shot, allowing 15 shots per cannon.
In Shipwrecked worlds, Nitre, an ingredient of Gunpowder, is not renewable. Despite this, Boat Cannons can be renewed by giving Lobster Dinner to Yaarctopus, using the Slot Machine to obtain Gunpowder, or by digging up an X Marks the Spot. Players can also go through the Seaworthy to the base game world and get renewable Nitre from Caves during Earthquakes.

It requires 5 [[Log]]s, 4 [[Gunpowder]] and 6 [[Coconut]]s to craft and a Science Machine to prototype. It can only be used while attached to a [[Boats|Boat's]] light slot. It does 100 damage and uses 6.66% of its durability per shot, allowing 15 shots per cannon. In ''Shipwrecked'' worlds, [[Nitre]], an ingredient of Gunpowder, is not renewable. Despite this, Boat Cannons can be renewed by giving [[Lobster Dinner]] to [[Yaarctopus]], using the [[Slot Machine]] to obtain [[Gunpowder]], or by digging up an [[X Marks the Spot]]. Players can also go through the [[Seaworthy]] to the base game world and get renewable Nitre from [[Caves]] during [[Earthquake]]s. =={{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item3 = Dubloons |count3 = 4 |item2 = Boards |count2 = 4 |item1 = Boat Cannon |count1 = 1 |result = The 'Sea Legs' |character = Woodlegs}} {{Craftable Items}} [[Category:Weapons]] [[Category:Ranged Weapons]] [[Category:Nautical Tab]] [[Category:Non-Flammable]] [[Category:Limited use]]
